text: In the first scene, I feel a sense of quiet anticipation—the open, minimalist space and scattered beanbags invite reflection and maybe the calm before a celebration. The gentle blue lighting sets a peaceful, contemplative mood. In the second scene, surrounded by the bright, vibrant wall and creative displays, I'm stimulated intellectually. The R+D theme hints at innovation and discovery. I feel inspired and curious, eager to learn and to question how technology and humanity interact. The contrast between calm space and energetic display makes me appreciate the different moods of the party experience.
